a.xlink:title: Abstract base class for EMT state-space nodal (SSN) components.
Abstract base class for EMT I-type SSN components.
Abstract base class for EMT V-type SSN components.
Base class for all components that are transmitting power.

Interface to be implemented by all models used by the MNA solver.
Base class for all MNA components that are transmitting power.
